sample_question: The least-squares regression line is y = 1x + 2. What does the gradient 1 mean?
what_should_be: For each increase of 1 in x, y increases by 1 (on average)
issue_summary: The template returns the numeric gradient itself instead of the interpretation the stem asks for.
sample_choices: The x-intercept is 1 | For each increase of 1 in x, y increases by 1 (on average) | For each increase of 1 in y, x increases by 1 | The y-intercept is 1

sample_question: A population grows according to P(t) = P₀ × 1.08^t. How long (nearest year) to triple?
issue_summary: Stem says nearest year, but template uses ceiling. Exact value here is 14.274915.
